title: [PATCH]: fix repo-only app links in app lists (apps/ dir) & workflows.
author: CloudCompile

gist.headline: Fixing the garden paths
gist.blurb: We've updated our community app lists to properly link to repository-only projects. The greenhouse is looking tidier than ever!
gist.summary: Refactored the GitHub Actions scripts that generate our app showcases to dynamically parse table columns, fixing broken links for repository-only apps.
gist.impact: Community apps without a dedicated web URL will now correctly link to their GitHub repositories in the README and Greenhouse lists.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, organizing signs or pathways in a greenhouse. A robot helper holding a map or a sign.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, organizing wooden signs in a lush digital greenhouse. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a glowing map of pathways. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, organizing wooden signs in a lush digital greenhouse.
